title: Android开发：实现二级列表功能
content:
效果



布局

  • 使用两个RecyclerView来填充，具体的样式自行设计

    创建CategoryService,定义获取一级和二级列表的数据

    public interface CategoryService {
   @GET("cat/show")
    Observable<HttpResult<List<CategoryEntity>>> getTopList();
    @GET("cat/show/{catId}")
    Observable<HttpResult<List<CategoryEntity>>> getSecondList(@Path("catId") int catId);
}

    创建CategoryPresenter，获取一级和二级列表的数据

    public class CategoryPresenter extends HttpMethods {
     //获取一级分类
    public static void getTopList(Subscriber<List<CategoryEntity>> subscriber){
        Observable<List<CategoryEntity>> observable = categoryService.getTopList().map(new HttpResultFunc<List<CategoryEntity>>());
        toSubscribe(observable,subscriber);
    }
    //获取二级分类
    public static void getSecondList(Subscriber<List<CategoryEntity>> subscriber,int catId){
        Observable<List<CategoryEntity>> observable = categoryService.getSecondList(catId).map(new HttpResultFunc<List<CategoryEntity>>());
        toSubscribe(observable,subscriber);
    }
}

    在CategoryRightListAdapter中构建每个子视图

    public class CategoryRightListAdapter extends RecyclerView.Adapter<RecyclerView.ViewHolder>{
    private Context mContext;
    private List<CategoryEntity> mRightList;

    public CategoryRightListAdapter(FragmentActivity activity, List<CategoryEntity> rightData) {
        this.mContext=activity;
        this.mRightList=rightData;
    }

    @NonNull
    @Override
    public RecyclerView.ViewHolder onCreateViewHolder(@NonNull ViewGroup parent, int viewType) {
        View view = LayoutInflater.from(parent.getContext()).inflate(R.layout.item_category_right_list, parent, false);
        CategoryRightListAdapter.ViewHolder viewHolder = new CategoryRightListAdapter.ViewHolder(view);
        return viewHolder;
    }

    @Override
    public void onBindViewHolder(@NonNull RecyclerView.ViewHolder holder, int position) {
        CategoryRightListAdapter.ViewHolder newViewHolder = (CategoryRightListAdapter.ViewHolder) holder;
        CategoryEntity categoryEntity = mRightList.get(position);
        newViewHolder.categoryItemText.setText(categoryEntity.getName());
        newViewHolder.categoryItemImage.setImageURL(categoryEntity.getImage());
        newViewHolder.itemView.setTag(categoryEntity);
    }

    @Override
    public int getItemCount() {
        return mRightList.size();
    }

    public static class ViewHolder extends RecyclerView.ViewHolder{
        private MyImageView categoryItemImage;
        private TextView categoryItemText;
        public ViewHolder(@NonNull View itemView) {
            super(itemView);
            categoryItemText = itemView.findViewById(R.id.categoryItemText);
            categoryItemImage = itemView.findViewById(R.id.categoryItemImage);
        }
    }
}

    在CategoryLeftListAdapter中构建每个子视图

  • 我们需要通过view单击事件来显示二级菜单，这里通过自定义接口，实现点击事件 
    public interface OnRecycleViewItemClickListener {
void onItemClick(View view, CategoryEntity categoryEntity);
}
  • public class CategoryLeftListAdapter  extends RecyclerView.Adapter<RecyclerView.ViewHolder> implements View.OnClickListener{
    private Context mContext;
    private List<CategoryEntity> mLeftList;
    private OnRecycleViewItemClickListener onRecycleViewItemClickListener = null;
    public CategoryLeftListAdapter(Context context, List<CategoryEntity> leftList){
        this.mContext=context;
        this.mLeftList=leftList;
    }
    @NonNull
    @Override
    public RecyclerView.ViewHolder onCreateViewHolder(@NonNull ViewGroup parent, int viewType) {
        View view = LayoutInflater.from(parent.getContext()).inflate(R.layout.item_category_left_list, parent, false);
        ViewHolder viewHolder = new ViewHolder(view);
        //注册view单击事件
        view.setOnClickListener(this);
        return viewHolder;
    }

    public void setOnItemClickListerner(OnRecycleViewItemClickListener listerner){
        this.onRecycleViewItemClickListener = listerner;
    }

    @Override
    public void onBindViewHolder(@NonNull RecyclerView.ViewHolder holder, int position) {

        ViewHolder newViewHolder = (ViewHolder) holder;
        CategoryEntity categoryEntity = mLeftList.get(position);
        newViewHolder.textView.setText(categoryEntity.getName());
        newViewHolder.itemView.setTag(categoryEntity);
    }

    @Override
    public int getItemCount() {
        return mLeftList.size();
    }

    @Override
    public void onClick(View v) {
        if(onRecycleViewItemClickListener!=null){
            CategoryEntity entity = (CategoryEntity) v.getTag();
            onRecycleViewItemClickListener.onItemClick(v, entity);

        }
    }

    public static class ViewHolder extends RecyclerView.ViewHolder{
        private TextView textView;
        public ViewHolder(@NonNull View itemView) {
            super(itemView);
            textView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.category_item_text);
        }
    }
}

    最后在CategoryFragment中创建视图

  • 发送请求获取一级列表的内容，传给适配器适配
  • 调用之前在categoryLeftListAdapter中写的点击事件方法，重新接口定义的onItemClick方法，在onItemClick方法中实现请求二级列表的数据并显示，以及修改点中的item的样式
    public class CategoryFragment extends Fragment {
    @BindView(R.id.searchView)
    SearchView searchView;
    @BindView(R.id.left_list)
    RecyclerView leftList;
    @BindView(R.id.right_list)
    RecyclerView rightList;

    private CategoryLeftListAdapter categoryLeftListAdapter;
    private CategoryRightListAdapter categoryRightListAdapter;
    private List<CategoryEntity> leftData = new ArrayList<>();
    private List<CategoryEntity> rightData = new ArrayList<>();
    private LinearLayoutManager leftManager;
    private GridLayoutManager rightManager;
    @Nullable
    @Override
    public View onCreateView(@NonNull LayoutInflater inflater, @Nullable ViewGroup container, @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
        @SuppressLint("InflateParams") View view = inflater.inflate(R.layout.activity_category, container, false);
        ButterKnife.bind(this, view);
        initViews();
        return view;
    }

    @SuppressLint("WrongConstant")
    private void initViews() {
        //设置左侧列表样式
        leftManager = new LinearLayoutManager(getActivity());
        leftManager.setOrientation(RecyclerView.VERTICAL);

        //设置右侧列表样式true
        rightManager = new GridLayoutManager(getActivity(), 3,RecyclerView.VERTICAL,false);
        leftList.setLayoutManager(leftManager);
        rightList.setLayoutManager(rightManager);
        rightList.addItemDecoration(new SpaceItemDecoration(20));

        //加载一级分类
        categoryLeftListAdapter = new CategoryLeftListAdapter(getActivity(),leftData);
        categoryRightListAdapter = new CategoryRightListAdapter(getActivity(),rightData);
        leftList.setAdapter(categoryLeftListAdapter);
        rightList.setAdapter(categoryRightListAdapter);
        CategoryPresenter.getTopList(new Subscriber<List<CategoryEntity>>() {
            @Override
            public void onCompleted() {

            }

            @Override
            public void onError(Throwable e) {

            }

            @Override
            public void onNext(List<CategoryEntity> categoryEntityList) {
                if(categoryEntityList.size()>0){
                    leftData.addAll(categoryEntityList);
                    //刷新RecycleView数据
                    categoryLeftListAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged();
                    //默认加载
                    loadRight(categoryEntityList.get(0).getCat_id(),categoryEntityList.get(0));
                }
            }
        });
        categoryLeftListAdapter.setOnItemClickListerner(new OnRecycleViewItemClickListener() {
            @Override
            public void onItemClick(View view, CategoryEntity categoryEntity) {
                loadRight(categoryEntity.getCat_id(),categoryEntity);
            }
        });

    }
    private void loadRight(int catId,CategoryEntity categoryEntity) {
        CategoryPresenter.getSecondList(new Subscriber<List<CategoryEntity>>(){

            @Override
            public void onCompleted() {
            }

            @Override
            public void onError(Throwable e) {
            }

            @Override
            public void onNext(List<CategoryEntity> categoryEntityList) {
                if(categoryEntityList.size()>0){
                    rightData.clear();
                    rightData.addAll(categoryEntityList);
                    //刷新RecycleView数据
                    categoryRightListAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged();
                    //判断当前是否处于点击状态，更新背景颜色
                    if(categoryEntity.getName().equals("饮料")){
                        leftManager.findViewByPosition(0)
                                .findViewById(R.id.category_item_text)
                                .setBackgroundColor(Color.parseColor("#ffffff"));
                        leftManager.findViewByPosition(1)
                                .findViewById(R.id.category_item_text)
                                .setBackgroundColor(Color.parseColor("#E0E0E0"));
                        leftManager.findViewByPosition(2)
                                .findViewById(R.id.category_item_text)
                                .setBackgroundColor(Color.parseColor("#E0E0E0"));
                    }else if(categoryEntity.getName().equals("酒水")){
                        leftManager.findViewByPosition(0)
                                .findViewById(R.id.category_item_text)
                                .setBackgroundColor(Color.parseColor("#E0E0E0"));
                        leftManager.findViewByPosition(1)
                                .findViewById(R.id.category_item_text)
                                .setBackgroundColor(Color.parseColor("#ffffff"));
                        leftManager.findViewByPosition(2)
                                .findViewById(R.id.category_item_text)
                                .setBackgroundColor(Color.parseColor("#E0E0E0"));
                    }else{
                        leftManager.findViewByPosition(0)
                                .findViewById(R.id.category_item_text)
                                .setBackgroundColor(Color.parseColor("#E0E0E0"));
                        leftManager.findViewByPosition(1)
                                .findViewById(R.id.category_item_text)
                                .setBackgroundColor(Color.parseColor("#E0E0E0"));
                        leftManager.findViewByPosition(2)
                                .findViewById(R.id.category_item_text)
                                .setBackgroundColor(Color.parseColor("#ffffff"));
                    }
                }
            }
        },catId);
    }
}

补充

  • 如果想要使用ImageView直接显示网络图片，可以自定义一个ImageView,继承androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatImageView
    public class MyImageView extends androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatImageView {
    public static final int GET_DATA_SUCCESS = 1;
    public static final int NETWORK_ERROR = 2;
    public static final int SERVER_ERROR = 3;
    //子线程不能操作UI，通过Handler设置图片
    private Handler handler = new Handler() {
        @Override
        public void handleMessage(Message msg) {
            switch (msg.what){
                case GET_DATA_SUCCESS:
                    Bitmap bitmap = (Bitmap) msg.obj;
                    setImageBitmap(bitmap);
                    break;
                case NETWORK_ERROR:
                    Toast.makeText(getContext(),"网络连接失败",Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show();
                    break;
                case SERVER_ERROR:
                    Toast.makeText(getContext(),"服务器发生错误",Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show();
                    break;
            }
        }
    };

    public MyImageView(Context context, AttributeSet attrs, int defStyleAttr) {
        super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr);
    }

    public MyImageView(Context context) {
        super(context);
    }

    public MyImageView(Context context, AttributeSet attrs) {
        super(context, attrs);
    }

    //设置网络图片
    public void setImageURL(final String path) {
        //开启一个线程用于联网
        new Thread() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    //把传过来的路径转成URL
                    URL url = new URL(path);
                    //获取连接
                    HttpURLConnection connection = (HttpURLConnection) url.openConnection();
                    //使用GET方法访问网络
                    connection.setRequestMethod("GET");
                    //超时时间为10秒
                    connection.setConnectTimeout(10000);
                    //获取返回码
                    int code = connection.getResponseCode();
                    if (code == 200) {
                        InputStream inputStream = connection.getInputStream();
                        //使用工厂把网络的输入流生产Bitmap
                        Bitmap bitmap = BitmapFactory.decodeStream(inputStream);
                        //利用Message把图片发给Handler
                        Message msg = Message.obtain();
                        msg.obj = bitmap;
                        msg.what = GET_DATA_SUCCESS;
                        handler.sendMessage(msg);
                        inputStream.close();
                    }else {
                        //服务启发生错误
                        handler.sendEmptyMessage(SERVER_ERROR);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    e.printStackTrace();
                    //网络连接错误
                    handler.sendEmptyMessage(NETWORK_ERROR);
                }
            }
        }.start();
    }
}
  • 在布局文件中使用时，只需使用MyImageView，要把刚才重写的一个MyImageView的全路径写上
    <com.cjpnice.mobileshop.view.MyImageView
        android:id="@+id/image_view"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent" />
  • 在Activity上，只要调用setImageURL()，直接把网络的图片路径写上就可以显示网络的图片了
    myImageView.setImageURL("https://cjpnice-picture.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/img/20200509161355.png");
